summary: P0 Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All 3 critical bugs verified FIXED. P0-1 (import duplicates), P0-2 (predictions disappear), P0-3 (stale last_5_performance) all working correctly.

P0-1_import_fixtures_duplicate_check.description: POST /api/admin/real-fixtures/import returns skipped_details with existing_matchday name
P0-1_import_fixtures_duplicate_check.evidence: Response includes skipped_details: [{fixture_id: 1378114, reason: 'already_imported', existing_matchday: 'Giornata 16', match: 'Atalanta vs Napoli'}]

P0-2_live_predictions_G15.description: GET /api/live/{matchday_id} returns predictions for COMPLETED matchday G15

P0-2_live_predictions_G17.description: GET /api/live/{matchday_id} returns predictions for COMPLETED matchday G17

P0-3_last_5_performance.description: GET /api/home returns last_5_performance with 5 most recent COMPLETED national matchdays
P0-3_last_5_performance.evidence: last_5_performance contains G13, G14, G15, G16, G17 (5 matchdays, not just G16-G17)

P0-3_user_summary.description: GET /api/home user_summary shows correct total_points and matchdays_played

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ P0-1 Fix: Import fixtures now queries matches collection globally by external_fixture_id and returns detailed skipped_details including existing_matchday label and match teams
✓ P0-2 Fix: Live endpoint correctly returns predictions for COMPLETED matchdays - predictions no longer disappear

✓ P0-3 Fix: Home endpoint now queries matchdays collection directly with NATIONAL_LEAGUE_ID instead of predictions (which had inconsistent league_ids), user_matchdays_played uses score_summaries distinct count
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 bugs fixed and verified. Key test matchday IDs: G15=42666812-114a-4195-b0b7-33d72155d9ad, G16=68523813-a795-4a74-87ec-68bdd0b7ace0, G17=38df601f-49f7-47d1-8f7e-2aa524884f7d. Already imported fixture: 1378114 (Atalanta vs Napoli in G16). NATIONAL_LEAGUE_ID=f1373417-43aa-4043-b6a2-125873181c95.

P0-1.bug: Import API-Football fixtures fails with wrong duplicate check
P0-1.fix: Returns skipped_details with existing_matchday name when fixture already imported

P0-2.fix: Live endpoint returns predictions correctly for COMPLETED matchdays

P0-3.bug: Home screen 'Ultimi 5 risultati' shows stale data
P0-3.fix: Query matchdays collection directly with NATIONAL_LEAGUE_ID instead of predictions
